columns.name: mimecast_body
columns.description: Full raw Mimecast event payload as received from the Event Push endpoint. Field names and presence vary by event type (Logtype for SEG events, auditType for Audit, url/impersonationResults for TTP).

dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend _L = tostring(mimecast_body.Logtype)
| extend _A = tostring(mimecast_body.auditType)
| extend _U = tostring(mimecast_body.url)
| extend _IR = tostring(mimecast_body.impersonationResults)
| extend mimecastEventType = case(
    _L == 'email_ttp_ap', 'email_ttp_ap',
    isnotempty(_L), 'seg_cg',
    isnotempty(_A), 'audit',
    isnotempty(_IR) and _IR != '[]', 'ttp_impersonation',
    isnotempty(_U), 'ttp_url',
    'unknown')
| extend mimecastEventId = case(
    mimecastEventType in ('audit', 'ttp_impersonation'), tostring(mimecast_body.id),
    mimecastEventType in ('seg_cg', 'email_ttp_ap'), tostring(mimecast_body.processingId),
    mimecastEventType == 'ttp_url', strcat(tostring(mimecast_body.messageId), '|', _U, '|', tostring(mimecast_body.date)),
    '')
| extend _epochMs = tolong(mimecast_body.timestamp)
| extend _tsISO   = tostring(case(
    mimecastEventType in ('audit', 'ttp_impersonation'), mimecast_body.eventTime,
    mimecastEventType == 'ttp_url', mimecast_body.date,
    ''))
| extend _tsCalc  = iff(
    mimecastEventType in ('seg_cg', 'email_ttp_ap') and _epochMs > 0,
    datetime(1970-01-01) + _epochMs * 1ms,
    todatetime(_tsISO))
| extend TimeGenerated    = iff(isnull(_tsCalc) or _tsCalc < ago(2d), now(), _tsCalc)
| extend eventTime        = _tsISO
| extend mimecastLogtype  = _L
| extend mimecastSubtype  = tostring(mimecast_body.subtype)
| extend senderAddress    = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderAddress), mimecast_body.senderAddress,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderEnvelope), mimecast_body.senderEnvelope,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.fromUserEmailAddress), mimecast_body.fromUserEmailAddress, ''))))
| extend recipientAddress = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.recipientAddress), mimecast_body.recipientAddress,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.userEmailAddress), mimecast_body.userEmailAddress, '')))
| extend subject          = tostring(mimecast_body.subject)
| extend action           = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.action), mimecast_body.action,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.actionTriggered), mimecast_body.actionTriggered, '')))
| extend messageId        = tostring(mimecast_body.messageId)
| extend route            = tostring(mimecast_body.route)
| extend url              = _U
| extend fileHash         = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.sha256), mimecast_body.sha256,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.fileHash), mimecast_body.fileHash, '')))
| extend fileName         = tostring(mimecast_body.fileName)
| extend scanResult       = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.scanResult), mimecast_body.scanResult,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.scanResults), mimecast_body.scanResults,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.result), mimecast_body.result, ''))))
| extend senderIp         = tostring(iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderIp), mimecast_body.senderIp,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.senderIpAddress), mimecast_body.senderIpAddress,
                              iff(isnotempty(mimecast_body.sendingIp), mimecast_body.sendingIp, ''))))
| extend auditType        = _A
| extend accountId        = tostring(mimecast_body.accountId)
| extend aggregateId      = tostring(mimecast_body.aggregateId)
| extend impersonationResults = mimecast_body.impersonationResults
| extend mimecast_body    = tostring(mimecast_body)
| project TimeGenerated, eventTime, mimecastEventType, mimecastEventId, mimecast_body,
          senderAddress, recipientAddress, subject, action, messageId, route,
          url, fileHash, fileName, scanResult, senderIp, auditType, accountId, aggregateId,
          mimecastLogtype, mimecastSubtype, impersonationResults
